entities.name: TOBACCO STREAK VIRUS
entities.description: A plant virus that infects groundnut and other host crops.

entities.name: SCIRTOTHRIPS DORSALIS
entities.description: A thrips species that acts as a vector for tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: FRANKLINELLA SCHULTZEI
entities.description: A thrips species that acts as a vector for tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: MEGALUROTHRIPS USITATUS
entities.description: A thrips species that acts as a vector for tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A host crop for tobacco streak virus, also known as Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A host crop for tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: SUNFLOWER
entities.description: A host crop whose pollen assists in the transmission of tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: POLLEN
entities.description: Biological material from infected sunflower plants that facilitates the transmission of TSV.

entities.name: TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The mechanism by which tobacco streak virus is spread between host plants.
